overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person driving through Night City. The player navigates a futuristic convertible from narrow neon-lit urban canyons through wider palm-lined boulevards toward a massive stadium structure, showcasing dense cyberpunk architecture with vibrant holographic billboards and mixed natural-artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk urban canyon with overhead highway ramps

agents.ego_description: driving convertible straight through narrow neon-lit city streets, maintaining steady speed between tall residential towers

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving ahead in same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall dark residential towers with multiple balconies and neon accents lining the street
matching tall residential towers on right side creating urban canyon effect
large glowing advertisement screen with animated cyberpunk graphics
elevated concrete highway structure crossing above the street ahead
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrow cyberpunk urban canyon flanked by towering residential buildings. Neon holographic billboards glow on both sides while an overhead highway ramp looms ahead. The street features yellow crosswalk markings and moderate traffic flows in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with highway overpass and curved ramp

events.description: vehicle executes right turn at intersection, entering wider street with red curbs
passing under massive highway overpass structure, lighting shifts to shadow then back

agents.ego_description: navigating right turn at intersection then accelerating under highway overpass, following curved road alignment

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars spanning the road
contemporary commercial building with reflective glass facade
tall glass office tower with geometric architectural patterns
sidewalk with distinctive red painted curb edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at an intersection, leaving the narrow canyon for a wider street flanked by modern glass buildings. It passes under a massive highway overpass around 22 seconds, transitioning from neon-lit shadows back to daylight. The road curves gently with red-curbed sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide palm-lined corporate boulevard with stadium visible in distance

events.description: entering wide boulevard lined with palm trees, architecture shifts to modern corporate glass towers

agents.ego_description: cruising straight down wide boulevard at high speed, passing other vehicles and approaching distant stadium structure

notable_agents.action: teal-colored futuristic car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: line of tall palm trees along the center median of the boulevard
matching row of palm trees on the right side of the wide avenue
sleek modern skyscraper with blue-tinted glass and horizontal neon lighting strips
tall corporate headquarters with reflective glass facade and geometric patterns
massive tiered stadium building with distinctive sloped roof visible at end of boulevard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit boulevard lined with palm trees and flanked by sleek glass office towers. The camera drives straight toward a massive stadium structure visible in the distance. The architecture shifts from dense cyberpunk to modern corporate style with clean lines and horizontal neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium approach plaza with pedestrian activity and wide intersection

events.description: approaching mega stadium structure, road widens into plaza area with increased pedestrian presence
vehicle slows and executes right turn navigating around stadium entrance plaza

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching stadium plaza, then executing right turn around the stadium perimeter with other traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along stadium plaza sidewalk

entered.detail: wide paved plaza area with stairs leading up to stadium entrances
open pedestrian space with people walking near stadium grounds

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the massive stadium structure which now dominates the left side of the frame. The environment shifts to a busy plaza with pedestrians walking along wide sidewalks. The car slows and turns right around the stadium perimeter, navigating through the intersection with other traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban canyon into a wide, sun-drenched corporate boulevard. It begins by navigating a narrow street flanked by towering residential buildings and glowing holographic billboards, moving beneath a looming overhead highway ramp. As the vehicle turns right at an intersection, the scene shifts from neon shadows into bright daylight, passing under a massive overpass and along red-curbed sidewalks. The environment then opens into a broad boulevard lined with palm trees and sleek glass office towers, with the architecture transitioning from dense cyberpunk grit to clean, modern corporate lines. Finally, the camera approaches a massive stadium structure that dominates the landscape, slowing as it enters a busy pedestrian plaza and turns right along the stadium's perimeter.
